assertions.expectation: Explains that exact upgrade dates are difficult to predict but several tools help narrow the window
assertions.reason: Response acknowledges that predictability depends on configuration and explains that release schedule shows 'no sooner than' dates, not exact dates, while providing tools to narrow the window

assertions.expectation: Mentions the GKE release schedule as a 'best case' timeline — upgrades won't happen before listed dates
assertions.reason: Explicitly states release schedule shows 'earliest possible dates' and 'no sooner than' dates, clarifying that actual upgrades may happen later

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the cluster's auto-upgrade status for the current target version and any pauses
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command to check upgrade info and mentions checking current auto-upgrade target version and rollback-safe upgrade status

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new releases roll out progressively across regions over 4-5 business days, and the version promotion path includes channel promotion (Rapid → Regular → Stable)
assertions.reason: Shows channel progression 'Rapid → Regular → Stable progression' in the release schedule section and mentions channel-specific timelines

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring maintenance windows so upgrades only happen during known time slots. May note that for ultimate predictability, customers can initiate upgrades themselves instead of waiting for auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Provides detailed maintenance window configuration commands and explicitly recommends manual upgrades for 'ultimate control' with maintenance exclusions

assertions.expectation: Mentions scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance, opt-in via Cloud Logging) or the get-upgrade-info API for checking target versions programmatically
assertions.reason: Details both 72-hour scheduled notifications via Cloud Logging and provides gcloud get-upgrade-info command for programmatic checking

assertions.expectation: Notes that GKE upgrade visibility shows the cluster's target version and EoL timeline
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions that upgrade info API shows 'Current auto-upgrade target version' and 'End of Support timestamps'

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing (advanced feature, limited adoption) as an option for multi-cluster predictability — not a primary recommendation
assertions.reason: Includes rollout sequencing section for multi-cluster fleet predictability with fleet configuration commands, presented as an additional option rather than primary recommendation
